title: Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English) Mission and Vision

Electrical-Electronics Engineering (English) Mission and Vision

MISSION

The Electrical-Electronics Engineering Department will make the best effort to promote an intellectual, ethical and technological environment to the students. The department invokes the desire and ability of life-long learning in the students for pursuing a successful career in engineering. The department supports high-quality teaching, research, and services that provide students a supportive environment and will provide suitable forums to enhance the creative talents of students and faculty members.

VISION

The vision of the Electrical-Electronics Engineering department is to conduct original research in all related areas of Electrical-Electronics Engineering. Through original research and high-quality education, the students will be prepared as outstanding engineers in the field of Electrical-Electronics Engineering to face the challenges in such disciplines.
